series_metadata.series_description: Stroke protocols submitted annually to the Division of Emergency Medical Services by local agencies pursuant to ORC 4765.401.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: If received in paper format, the item will be scanned and converted to machine readable medium and the paper destroyed immediately. ; Electronic: Each version will be maintained no longer than two (2) years from the end of the calendar year following the date of submission to the Division., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
